name: subtitler-frontend
description: Electron frontend for the four-workflow subtitler

scripts.electron: npm run clean:electron && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron .
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run electron"
scripts.build: vite build && npm run clean:electron && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json
